content: Fun awọn wiwọn scattering neutron ni yàrá ohun elo condensed matter wa, iru eto amortization wo ni a yẹ ki a lo fun awọn constants calibration ti ọdun to kọja lẹ́yìn tí a bá ṣe imudojuiwọn beamline gẹgẹ bi eto to ṣeto? A fẹ lati pin iye akoko to ku ti data calibration atijọ ni ibamu pẹlu jiometiri detector tuntun.
